reasoning: The README's post-install instructions are out-of-scope for AUR security audits. All build/install scripts (PKGBUILD, install.sh) are safe with verified checksums and no malicious behavior.
disagreement_analysis: qwen incorrectly flagged README's user guidance as a security risk despite it being non-executable documentation.
false_positives: README flagged as unsafe: Documentation-only file containing post-install user instructions (SSH config suggestions) not executed during build/install.
learnings: Improve threat model awareness: De-prioritize documentation files unless referenced in PKGBUILD/.install scripts.
Enhance prompt clarity: Explicitly state that user guidance in READMEs isn't a security risk unless automated during build/install.
Adjust scoring: Reduce weight of non-executable files in final verdict determination.
